query:
-- 新增 Superpowers 風格的欄位到 agentSkills 資料表
ALTER TABLE agentSkills 
ADD COLUMN whenToUse TEXT AFTER description,
ADD COLUMN corePattern TEXT AFTER whenToUse,
ADD COLUMN quickReference TEXT AFTER corePattern,
ADD COLUMN commonMistakes TEXT AFTER quickReference,
ADD COLUMN realWorldImpact TEXT AFTER commonMistakes,
ADD COLUMN skillCategory ENUM('technique', 'pattern', 'reference') DEFAULT 'technique' AFTER skillType,
ADD COLUMN version INT DEFAULT 1 AFTER skillCategory,
ADD COLUMN previousVersionId INT AFTER version,
ADD COLUMN dependsOn TEXT AFTER previousVersionId,
ADD COLUMN testCases TEXT AFTER dependsOn,
ADD COLUMN lastTestedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER testCases,
ADD COLUMN testPassRate DECIMAL(3,2) AFTER lastTestedAt;
